rationale: The only direct match evidence is a single DOI-listed reference (10.1509/jmr.13.0180) with no in-text citation context or quoted usage. While both papers are in Dutch grocery settings and involve private labels, price, and promotion variables, the cited paper’s core focus is supermarket price-war effects rather than umbrella rebranding, so substantive dependence is plausible but not demonstrated from the provided evidence.
